model_routing_guidance.Gemma_via_Ollama: easy local text compression, checklist drafts, risk label classification, markdown summarization — zero API cost, local-only
model_routing_guidance.Codex: independent audits, source crosschecks, medium-complexity implementation review, standalone analysis docs
model_routing_guidance.Claude_Code: hard multi-file implementation, difficult debugging, runtime wiring, validation, repo commits and push coordination
model_routing_guidance.ChatGPT: high-level planning, prompt design, strategic roadmap decisions, source-backed reasoning, milestone framing

api_saving_policy: Use Gemma/Ollama for easy local tasks to reduce paid API usage. Not cap bypass or quota evasion.
notes: This is an example policy file. enabled=false means the router will not run tasks automatically. preview_only mode allows --preview smoke runs and compress_context runs without live routing.
